name: libnet-rawip-perl
title: libnet-rawip-perl
description:
Perl interface to lowlevel TCP/IP
Net::RawIP gives you the ability to create and manipulate arbitrary IP
packages and fiddle around with every bit in the protocol header.
.
This module is useful if you want to implement a "traceroute" or "ping" in
PERL or you just want to learn about TCP/IP protocol suite but are afraid of
the C language.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnet-rawip-perl because Perl interface to lowlevel TCP/IP.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnet-rawip-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnet-rawip-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnet-rawip-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
